channel.title: Te Rourou Tātaritanga
channel.description: Recent content on Te Rourou Tātaritanga

item.title: What's in the IDI?
item.description: The IDI Search App allows researchers to explore what variables are available in the IDI, and provides descriptions and SQL information about each variable. Check out the app here: https://idi-search.web.app

item.title: Intergenerational Analyses using the IDI
item.description: This report documents the potential for intergenerational links in the Integrated Data Infrastructure (IDI). Three questions are answered: How many people can be linked back one, two, and three generations? How does this vary by decade of birth? How does this vary by ethnicity and deprivation?
